title: Sample composition and data coverage
interpretation_boundary: Shows sample balance and usable observations.

title: Abnormal-return trends
interpretation_boundary: Descriptive trends; not a formal parallel-trends test.

title: Cumulative abnormal returns
interpretation_boundary: Unadjusted group means; formal inference is in DiD.

title: Python/R DiD validation
interpretation_boundary: Displays the main persistent-effect estimate and 95% confidence intervals.

title: Event-study forest plot
interpretation_boundary: Short-window associations across events and windows.

title: Event CAR distributions
interpretation_boundary: Firm-level distribution for the [-1,+1] window.

title: SCM cumulative trajectory
interpretation_boundary: Treatment is a revenue-threshold exposure proxy.

title: SCM monthly gap
interpretation_boundary: Treatment is a revenue-threshold exposure proxy.

title: SCM placebo inference
interpretation_boundary: Compares treated proxy MSPE ratio with donor placebos.

title: SCM donor weights
interpretation_boundary: Documents synthetic-control composition.

title: Revenue trends
interpretation_boundary: Only one usable pre-implementation fiscal year.

title: DiD dynamic pretrend diagnostic
interpretation_boundary: Pretrend rejection weakens causal interpretation.

title: DiD baseline covariate balance
interpretation_boundary: Large standardized differences indicate poor comparability.

title: DiD robustness specifications
interpretation_boundary: Specifications remain associational when identifying assumptions are weak.

title: SCM leave-one-donor-out sensitivity
interpretation_boundary: Assesses dependence on the largest donor weights.

title: Four-year scope classification
interpretation_boundary: Scope requires all four years and at least two years above EUR 750m.

title: Pre-policy exposure distribution
interpretation_boundary: Exposure is a constructed proxy, not observed top-up tax.

title: Continuous exposure event study
interpretation_boundary: Conditional short-window association; concurrent news remains possible.

title: Propensity common support
interpretation_boundary: Shows whether treated and controls are comparable on observed covariates.

title: Weighted covariate balance
interpretation_boundary: Weighting addresses observed covariates only.

title: Weighted DiD pretrend
interpretation_boundary: Failure to reject does not prove parallel trends.

title: Modern method applicability
interpretation_boundary: Shows which modern estimators are supported by current data and which remain not applicable.

title: Treatment-timing cohort support
interpretation_boundary: Current proxy has one implementation cohort and no firm-jurisdiction staggered exposure.

title: gsynth balanced-panel attrition
interpretation_boundary: Documents sample attrition before interpreting any generalized synthetic-control output.

title: HonestDiD pre-period support
interpretation_boundary: HonestDiD requires credible event-study coefficients; this chart reports input support only.

title: GRF sample and covariate support
interpretation_boundary: GRF results are diagnostics because treatment proxy and overlap limitations remain.

title: Restricted-sample DiD comparison
interpretation_boundary: Restricted overlap estimates are not promoted to the main causal result.

title: Event confound screen
interpretation_boundary: High-volatility flags are diagnostics only and do not delete policy events.

title: CbCR low-tax context
interpretation_boundary: CbCR jurisdiction context does not create firm-level Pillar Two treatment exposure.
